---
title: "Alejandro Reyes"
subtitle: Principal Investigator
image: people-images/alejandro-reyes.jpeg
about :
  template: jolla
  image: people-images/alejandro-reyes.jpeg
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com
---


In my microbiology training, I developed an appreciation for microbial communities and their impact on ecosystems, including our bodies. Faced with tool limitations, my master's propelled me into molecular and genetic methods. Advances in techniques led me to computational biology during my Ph.D., honing skills for studying microbial communities. Now, as an assistant professor, I'm committed to applying tools to understand how microbial communities function in diverse environments, influencing health and agriculture.
